trip.title: Lake Garda 2026
trip.subtitle: 7-Night Riviera Coach Tour — Riva del Garda

transport.note: All daytime excursions provided by tour guide. Hotel is B&B — evenings are independent. Use local taxis or walk for evening restaurants. Hotel is centrally located in Riva del Garda old town.
transport.taxi_tip: Ask hotel reception to call a local taxi. Typical fares from Piazza Catena: within Riva del Garda €5-8 return; Arco (3km) €8-12 return; Torbole (8km) €12-18 return. itTaxi app works in larger towns.

stays.name: Hotel Europa SkyPool & Panorama 4*
stays.location: Piazza Catena 13, Riva del Garda, TN, Italy

bike_hire.name: CCT Bike Rental — Arco (3km from hotel)
bike_hire.note: E-MTB, road bikes, gravel, e-bikes and trekking bikes available. Arco is the main local pickup point — 3km from hotel (€8 taxi each way). Book ahead online, minimum 2 days rental at some locations. Also: Velolake (velolake.com) delivers to Riva del Garda.

days.title: Fly Heathrow to Venice — Arrive Riva del Garda (Free Afternoon)
map_waypoints: Venice Marco Polo Airport VCE Italy

stops.name: Venice Marco Polo Airport (VCE)
stops.detail: Depart LHR 11:50, arrive VCE 15:05. Meet tour guide at arrivals — coach transfer to Riva del Garda (~1.5 hrs). Arrive hotel approximately 16:30–17:00.
stops.maps_query: Venice Marco Polo Airport VCE Italy

stops.name: Piazza III Novembre — evening orientation walk
stops.detail: The hotel is on Piazza Catena, 2 min walk from Piazza III Novembre — the beautiful main lakeside square. Take a gentle stroll along the Lungolago (lakefront promenade). Flat, easy, ~1.5 miles. Perfect for shaking off the flight. ~3,000 steps.
stops.maps_query: Piazza III Novembre Riva del Garda TN Italy

stops.name: Aperitivo on the lakefront
stops.detail: Italian ritual — find a terrace bar on or near Piazza III Novembre. Spritz Aperol or local Trentino wine with olives and cicchetti (small bites) included. Best way to arrive in Italy. ~17:30-18:30.
stops.maps_query: bar aperitivo Piazza III Novembre Riva del Garda

eating.name: € Budget — Pizzeria near Piazza III Novembre
eating.detail: First night — keep it simple. A central pizzeria within easy walking distance of the hotel. Classic Neapolitan pizza and pasta. ~€15-20pp. Walking distance.
eating.maps_query: pizzeria Riva del Garda centro storico TN Italy

eating.name: €€ Mid-range — Ristorante La Berlera, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Restaurant in an ancient building with rooms carved into the rock, under centuries-old berlere trees. Località Ceole, 8/B — ~3km from hotel (taxi ~€8). Fresh lake fish (lavarello, trout, perch), risotto and Trentino wines. Seasonal menu. ~€40-50pp.
eating.maps_query: Ristorante La Berlera Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€€ Fine Dining — Al Volt, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: One of Riva's finest restaurants — in a beautiful historic vaulted cellar, Via Fiume 73. Excellent Trentino and Italian cuisine, outstanding wine cellar. ~€65-80pp. 5 min walk from hotel. Book in advance.
eating.maps_query: Al Volt ristorante Riva del Garda Via Fiume TN Italy

notes: Flight: BA LHR 11:50 → VCE 15:05. BA Groups booking.
Coach transfer from Venice Marco Polo to Riva del Garda (~1.5 hrs). Tour guide meets at arrivals.
Long travel day — keep the evening very gentle. Piazza III Novembre aperitivo + nearby dinner is plenty.
Hotel: Hotel Europa SkyPool & Panorama 4★, Piazza Catena 13, Riva del Garda. hoteleuropariva.it

days.title: Coach Excursion — Sirmione & South Lake

stops.name: Sirmione Peninsula
stops.detail: Narrow medieval peninsula jutting into the lake. Walk the old town walls and lakeside promenade. Very busy in September — stay with the group.

stops.name: Scaligero Castle, Sirmione
stops.detail: Well-preserved 13th-century moated castle with lake views. One of the best-preserved Scaligero fortresses.

stops.name: Lazise
stops.detail: Charming walled village on the east shore. Lakeside walk, piazza cafés, intact medieval walls.

eating.name: Lunch — lakeside, Sirmione (coach stop)
eating.detail: Cafés along the Sirmione promenade — go for pizza al taglio or a light lunch. Avoid the most tourist-facing spots directly on the castle square.
eating.maps_query: restaurant lakeside Sirmione BS Italy

eating.name: € Budget — Trattoria near hotel, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Simple trattoria within walking distance of the hotel. Pasta, grilled meat or fish, house wine by the carafe. ~€20-25pp.
eating.maps_query: trattoria osteria Riva del Garda centro TN Italy

eating.name: €€ Mid-range — Osteria Il Gallo, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Traditional Trentino osteria with excellent local wine and classic dishes — canederli (bread dumplings), lake fish, Trentino charcuterie. ~€38-45pp. Short walk from hotel.
eating.maps_query: Osteria Il Gallo Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€€ Fine Dining — Al Volt, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Historic vaulted cellar restaurant, Via Fiume 73. Excellent Trentino and Italian cuisine. ~€65-80pp. Book in advance.
eating.maps_query: Al Volt ristorante Riva del Garda TN Italy

notes: Sirmione is very busy in August/September — the coach will arrive early to beat the worst crowds.
Long coach day south and back — comfortable shoes, light bag.

days.title: Coach Excursion — Malcesine & Monte Baldo Cable Car

stops.name: Malcesine Old Town
stops.detail: Prettiest village on the east shore. Castello Scaligero di Malcesine overlooks the lake. Narrow car-free alleys and lakeside cafés.

stops.name: Monte Baldo Cable Car
stops.detail: Rotating cable car to 1,760m. Panoramic views over the lake and Alps. Spectacular. Book in advance for September — this sells out.
stops.maps_query: Funivie del Baldo Malcesine VR Italy

stops.name: CCT Bike Rental — Malcesine (optional)
stops.detail: CCT Bike Rental has a pickup point in Malcesine. E-MTB and trekking bikes available if you want to explore the lake path independently on the return. Book online in advance.

eating.name: Lunch — Malcesine harbour
eating.detail: The harbour-front cafés in Malcesine are lovely — try grilled lavarello (lake whitefish) or a simple pasta before or after the cable car.
eating.maps_query: restaurant Malcesine harbour VR Italy

eating.name: € Budget — Pizzeria, easy evening
eating.detail: After a big cable car day, a local pizzeria near the hotel is an easy choice. ~€15-20pp. Walking distance.
eating.maps_query: pizzeria Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€ Mid-range — Ristorante Bastione, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Restaurant actually at the Bastione fortress — reached by panoramic lift or 20-min walk through the woods from town. Stunning terrace views over the lake and Riva. Trentino-Sicilian cuisine. ~€40-50pp. 20 min walk up or ~€10 taxi to the lift.
eating.maps_query: Bastione Lounge Restaurant Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€€ Fine Dining — Al Volt, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Best restaurant in Riva del Garda — historic vaulted cellar, Via Fiume 73. ~€65-80pp. Book ahead.
eating.maps_query: Al Volt ristorante Riva del Garda TN Italy

notes: Book Monte Baldo cable car in advance — extremely busy in September, sells out early.
The cable car rotates slowly during ascent — move around the cabin for 360° views.
Warm layer for the top — it can be 10°C cooler at 1,760m even in September.

days.title: Free Day — Explore Riva del Garda & Arco
map_waypoints: CCT bike rental Arco TN Italy
Bastione Riva del Garda TN Italy

stops.name: MORNING — Road Bike Hire: Riva → Torbole → Nago loop
stops.detail: Book a road bike or e-bike at CCT Bike Rental (Arco, 3km from hotel — €8 taxi each way). Head north along the flat lakeside path from Riva to Torbole (~8km), then continue to Nago viewpoint if legs allow. Return the same route. Total ~28-32km, 2–3 hours riding, almost no elevation on the lakeside path. Riva → Torbole is one of the best easy flat rides on the lake. Start ~08:30-09:00 to be back for a late lunch. Book the bike online at least 2 days ahead.
stops.maps_query: CCT bike rental Arco TN Italy

stops.name: AFTERNOON — Bastione Fortress walk
stops.detail: After the morning ride, a gentle afternoon option. Iconic 16th-century Venetian tower above the town — 30 min walk up through olive groves from Piazza III Novembre. Panoramic views over Riva and the lake. Easy well-signposted path. ~2,000 steps up and back. Free.
stops.maps_query: Bastione Riva del Garda TN Italy

stops.name: AFTERNOON (alt) — Cascata del Varone waterfall
stops.detail: Dramatic gorge waterfall 3km from Riva centre — taxi ~€8 each way or 35 min walk. Two viewing platforms inside the gorge — genuinely spectacular. About 1,000 steps on site. A good shaded option on a hot afternoon.
stops.maps_query: Cascata del Varone Riva del Garda TN Italy

stops.name: AFTERNOON (alt) — Arco medieval town & castle
stops.detail: 3km from Riva (€8 taxi). World-famous rock climbing destination. The ruined castle above the town is a short but steep walk (~1,500 steps return, 20 min). Lovely central piazza and coffee shops below for a post-walk espresso.

eating.name: Lunch — Torbole lakefront (if cycling through)
eating.detail: Torbole is the windsurf capital of northern Italy — small harbour town 8km from Riva on the bike route. Good cafés along the lakefront for a mid-ride or post-ride lunch. Simple pasta and a beer with lake views.
eating.maps_query: restaurant Torbole lakefront TN Italy

eating.name: € Budget — Enoteca with Trentino wines, Riva
eating.detail: Free day calls for a relaxed evening. An enoteca (wine bar) near the hotel with local Trentino wines and cicchetti (small bites). ~€18-25pp. Walking distance.
eating.maps_query: enoteca wine bar Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€ Mid-range — Ristorante pesce lago, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: After a day of exploring locally, a proper lake-fish dinner. Lake trout, lavarello, tench — paired with a crisp Nosiola or Pinot Grigio from the Trentino hills. ~€38-48pp.
eating.maps_query: ristorante pesce lago Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€€ Fine Dining — Al Volt, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Free day is perfect for booking Al Volt — the best dinner in Riva. Historic vaulted cellar, Via Fiume 73. ~€65-80pp. Book several days in advance.
eating.maps_query: Al Volt ristorante Riva del Garda TN Italy

notes: No coach today — entirely self-directed. Free day for David & Lesley.
Suggested day: morning road bike ride Riva → Torbole → return (08:30–11:30, ~30km) → lunch Torbole or Riva → afternoon Bastione walk or Cascata del Varone or Arco → evening dinner.
Book CCT Bike Rental at least 2 days ahead online — road bikes and e-bikes both available. Arco pickup is 3km from hotel (€8 taxi).
Riva → Torbole lake path is flat, signposted and car-free for most of the route. Ideal for a fast 2–3 hour road bike ride.
Total walking for full day (ride + afternoon activity): ~7,000-9,000 steps — well within 10,000 limit.

days.title: Coach Excursion — Limone sul Garda & West Shore

stops.name: Limone sul Garda
stops.detail: Tiny lemon-grove village clinging to steep cliffs on the west shore. Terraced citrus gardens, colourful harbour, narrow lanes. Very popular — stay with the coach group.

stops.name: Gargnano
stops.detail: Quiet, authentic lakeside town — less touristy than most. Beautiful Art Nouveau villa gardens. Worth a slower wander.

eating.name: Lunch — Limone harbour
eating.detail: The harbour restaurants in Limone are tourist-priced but the views are spectacular. Try grilled lake fish with the cliff-and-lemon backdrop — worth the premium once.
eating.maps_query: restaurant Limone sul Garda harbour BS Italy

eating.name: € Budget — Pizza or pasta near hotel, Riva
eating.detail: Long west-shore coach day — keep the evening relaxed. Local pizzeria or trattoria within walking distance of the hotel. ~€15-20pp.
eating.maps_query: pizzeria trattoria centro storico Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€ Mid-range — Ristorante La Berlera, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Restaurant in Località Ceole (~3km, taxi ~€8). Ancient building with rooms carved into rock. Fresh lake fish, Trentino wines. Good mid-week dinner. ~€40-50pp.
eating.maps_query: Ristorante La Berlera Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€€ Fine Dining — Al Volt, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Historic vaulted cellar, Via Fiume 73. ~€65-80pp. Book in advance.
eating.maps_query: Al Volt ristorante Riva del Garda TN Italy

notes: West shore road (Gardesana Occidentale SS45bis) is narrow and dramatic — the coach journey itself is a highlight.
Limone is genuinely clinging to the cliff — it feels completely different from the east shore.

days.title: Coach Excursion — Bardolino Wine & Lake Swim Day

stops.name: Lake Swimming — Lido or beach
stops.detail: Coach stops at a lake lido or beach for swimming. September water temperature is excellent (~22-24°C). Bring swimwear and towel.

stops.name: Bardolino — Wine Tasting at Cantina Zeni
stops.detail: Bardolino is the home of Bardolino DOC red wine. Cantina Zeni is a well-known family winery open for walk-in tasting. Also: Guerrieri Rizzardi cantina nearby. Try the young Bardolino and the fuller Bardolino Classico Superiore.

stops.name: SUP or kayak hire — Riva lakefront (alternative quiet day)
stops.detail: If you prefer to stay local, Riva's waterfront has SUP and kayak hire for a relaxed lake day without the coach. World-class conditions for beginners.
stops.maps_query: SUP kayak paddleboard hire Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: Lunch — lakeside, Bardolino
eating.detail: Relaxed lunch in Bardolino. The lakefront piazza has decent cafés — bruschetta, lake fish, or a long aperitivo lunch to complement the wine tasting.
eating.maps_query: restaurant Bardolino piazza VR Italy

eating.name: € Budget — Osteria near hotel, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: After a wine-tasting day, keep dinner light and local. A classic osteria near the hotel — glass of Trentino Pinot Nero and simple pasta. ~€20-25pp. Walking distance.
eating.maps_query: osteria Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€ Mid-range — Ristorante Bastione, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: Restaurant at the Bastione fortress, reached by panoramic lift or 20-min woodland walk. Terrace with panoramic views over the lake. Trentino-Sicilian cuisine. ~€40-50pp. Taxi to the lift ~€10.
eating.maps_query: Bastione Lounge Restaurant Riva del Garda TN Italy

eating.name: €€€ Fine Dining — Al Volt, Riva del Garda
eating.detail: The ideal night to book Al Volt — pair the excellent Trentino wine list with the Bardolino tasting you did today. Via Fiume 73. ~€65-80pp. Book ahead.
eating.maps_query: Al Volt ristorante Riva del Garda TN Italy

notes: Cantina Zeni in Bardolino welcomes walk-ins for tasting — no booking needed, but confirm opening hours.
Lake swim day in September is excellent — the lake is at its warmest after a full summer.

days.title: Coach Excursion — Verona Day Trip

stops.name: Verona Old Town
stops.detail: UNESCO World Heritage city. Piazza Bra, the Arena amphitheatre, Piazza delle Erbe, Juliet's Balcony (Casa di Giulietta), Castelvecchio and the Ponte Scaligero bridge.
stops.maps_query: Verona city centre Piazza Bra VR Italy

stops.name: Verona Arena
stops.detail: One of the best-preserved Roman amphitheatres in the world — 1st century AD. Inside access ~€10pp. Outstanding engineering up close.

eating.name: Lunch — Trattoria, Verona (away from Piazza Bra)
eating.detail: Eat in Verona — Piazza delle Erbe and the side streets have good cafés and trattorias. Avoid the most expensive tourist tables directly on Piazza Bra. Go 1-2 streets back for better value.
eating.maps_query: trattoria Verona city centre away from tourist area VR Italy

eating.name: € Budget — Osteria al Duca, Verona (eat in Verona before coach home)
eating.detail: Historic Veronese osteria in a 13th-century house once belonging to the Montecchi family (Romeo's house). Via Arche Scaligere 2. Horse meat (pastissada, a Verona speciality), bigoli pasta, local Soave and Amarone wine. ~€22-28pp. Eat early in Verona before the coach departs.
eating.maps_query: Osteria al Duca Verona Via Arche Scaligere VR Italy

eating.name: €€ Mid-range — Trattoria Al Pompiere, Verona
eating.detail: Historic Veronese trattoria in a 16th-century building near Piazza delle Erbe. Superb risotto all'Amarone, grilled horse meat, enormous wine list. ~€45-55pp. Book ahead.
eating.maps_query: Trattoria Al Pompiere Verona Vicolo Regina d'Ungheria VR Italy

eating.name: €€€ Fine Dining — Ristorante Arche, Verona
eating.detail: Grand last night treat in Verona — one of the city's great restaurants, near the Ponte Scaligero. Exceptional Amarone-led wine list, historic setting. ~€80-100pp. Book well in advance. Perfect special occasion finale.
eating.maps_query: Ristorante Arche Verona Via Arche Scaligere VR Italy

notes: Last full day — pack bags in the evening ready for early departure tomorrow.
For the best last-night dinner: eat in Verona (confirm coach return time with guide), then head back to Riva for the final night.
Ristorante Arche is one of the great restaurants of northern Italy — if you book one special dinner on the whole trip, this is the one.

days.title: Return — Fly Venice to Heathrow
map_waypoints: Venice Marco Polo Airport VCE Italy

stops.name: Venice Marco Polo Airport (VCE)
stops.detail: Coach transfer from hotel to VCE (~1.5 hrs). Flight VCE 14:20 → LHR 15:45 (BA Groups). Confirm exact coach departure time with tour guide the evening before.
stops.maps_query: Venice Marco Polo Airport VCE Italy

notes: Flight: BA VCE 14:20 → LHR 15:45. BA Groups booking.
Coach departs hotel in the morning — confirm exact time with tour guide on Day 7 evening.
Check out of hotel morning of 7 Sep. Leave room key with reception before boarding.

bookings_required.notes: Outbound: 31 Aug LHR 11:50 → VCE 15:05. Inbound: 7 Sep VCE 14:20 → LHR 15:45. Mr & Mrs David Castledine.

bookings_required.item: Hotel Europa SkyPool & Panorama 4* — Superior Double Lake View (7 nights)
bookings_required.notes: Piazza Catena 13, Riva del Garda. Check-in 31 Aug, check-out 7 Sep 2026. B&B basis. Mr & Mrs David Castledine.
Book in advance for September — sells out. Day 3 (2 Sep). Coach tour guide may arrange group booking.
Day 7 (6 Sep). Coach tour guide may arrange. Optional — can queue on the day but pre-booking saves time.

bookings_required.item: Al Volt Restaurant, Riva del Garda — evening dinner
bookings_required.notes: Michelin-selected. Best restaurant in Riva — historic vaulted cellar, Via Fiume 73. CLOSED MONDAYS. Book by phone or email: info@ristorantealvolt.com. ~€65-80pp. Recommended evenings: Day 1, 4 or 6 (avoid Monday).
bookings_required.action: Book via ristorantealvolt.com or email info@ristorantealvolt.com

bookings_required.item: Ristorante Arche, Verona — last night dinner
bookings_required.notes: Day 7 last night splurge in Verona. Via Arche Scaligere 6, near Ponte Scaligero. Open since 1877. Fish specialties and Veronese cuisine. Book well in advance — closed Mondays. ~€80-100pp.

bookings_required.item: CCT Bike Rental — Arco/Riva del Garda
bookings_required.notes: E-MTB, road bike, gravel, trekking bikes. Pickup in Arco (3km from hotel) or delivery. Book online 3+ days ahead. Best day: Day 4 (free day). Also Day 3 option in Malcesine.
Day 4 free day. 3km from hotel (€8 taxi). ~€7pp entry. No advance booking needed.

hospitals.name: Ospedale Santa Maria del Carmine — Rovereto (nearest A&E, 20km)
hospitals.maps_query: Ospedale Santa Maria del Carmine Rovereto TN Italy

hospitals.name: Ospedale Santa Chiara — Trento (main hospital, 40km)
hospitals.maps_query: Ospedale Santa Chiara Trento TN Italy

hospitals.name: Ospedale Civile Maggiore — Verona (for Verona day)
hospitals.maps_query: Ospedale Civile Maggiore Verona VR Italy
